# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: web-api-service
    url: http://web-api.internal:8080
    routes:
      - name: web-api-route
        paths:
          - /api
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
          - OPTIONS
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
                - https://staging.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Accept
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-API-Key
                - X-Correlation-Id
                - DNT
                - User-Agent
                - Keep-Alive
                - Cache-Control
                - X-Requested-With
                - If-Modified-Since
                - Pragma
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-RateLimit-Limit
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining
                - X-RateLimit-Reset
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              hide_credentials: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 1000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false

consumers:
  - username: web-app-consumer
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: replace-with-secure-api-key

routes:
  - name: public-web-route
    paths:
      - /public
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
          credentials: false
          max_age: 600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 5000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false

  - name: authenticated-web-route
    paths:
      - /secure
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins:
            - https://app.example.com
            - https://admin.example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
            - PUT
            - PATCH
            - DELETE
            - OPTIONS
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Authorization
            - Content-Type
            - Origin
            - X-Requested-With
            - X-API-Key
          exposed_headers:
            - X-Request-Id
            - X-RateLimit-Limit
            - X-RateLimit-Remaining
            - X-RateLimit-Reset
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
          preflight_continue: false
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
            - x-api-key
          hide_credentials: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 500
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
